page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Eva & Eva 2 Anthology
text:
is a manga, Illustration and essays anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion and Neon Genesis Evangelions. It is compiled into a single volume and it was published by Kadokawa Shoten in 27 April 2004. https://web.archive.org/web/20080219135257/http://www.gainax.co.jp/anime/eva/comic.html Various collaborators featured in would create other Evangelion spinoffs later like Osamu Takahashi and Tony Takezaki. It was published on the Monthly Shonen Ace in the September 2003 special edition "Eva Ace", and subsequent stories until 2004.

Editions

ISBN-13: ISBN 4047136239
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4047136236
